title: okta_app
description: One Okta application (sign-on integration), with MFA-enforcement flag policies check today. mfa_required is derived from the sign-on mode by the plugin (federated modes imply IdP-layer MFA); full sign-on-policy-rule inspection is deferred.

sign_on_mode.description: Okta sign-on mode: SAML_2_0 | OPENID_CONNECT | SECURE_PASSWORD_STORE | BROWSER_PLUGIN | BASIC_AUTH | AUTO_LOGIN | WS_FEDERATION | …
